abilities.name: Evasive
abilities.description: Immune to damage from pulse (p) effects.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: Ignores terrain penalties when taking Movement Actions.

actions: (1) Steel Claws (Pneumatic) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/4 damage. Tome Overheat: Destroy this character, everyone within p2 suffers 2 damage.
(0) Swarm Together | This character and at least one other friendly within a3 become Steam Arachnid Swarm with Rank Value Condition.
system.notes: Small spider-like spy constructs for Arcanists. Weak individually. Programmed to merge into deadly swarms.
